title: Photonic Inc. Partners with TELUS, Demonstrates World-First Quantum Communications Running Over Today’s Network Infrastructure
why:
- Photonic Inc. and TELUS successfully demonstrated a world-first quantum teleportation of its kind over 30 km of installed commercial fibre using existing TELUS PureFibre network infrastructure.
- The demonstration transferred quantum information into a matter-based quantum processor that can retain, store, and use the information, unlike previous demonstrations that only measured photonic qubits.
- This achievement marks a critical milestone for establishing long-distance quantum networks and commercial-scale quantum computers.
- The demonstration utilized Photonic's Entanglement First™ architecture, combining silicon-based qubits with telecom band photonic connectivity.
- The collaboration demonstrates that existing telecommunications infrastructure can support quantum networking, paving the way for scalable deployment of quantum-secure networks and distributed quantum computing.
